zh.lifeSummary: 當William Waldron於1535年出生在英國波克夏藍布時，他的父親Lord Thomas Waldron25歲，母親Maryan Woldron25歲。他和Agnes Dislin至少有3個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1586年在他的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Waldron于1535年出生在英国波克夏藍布时，他的父亲Lord Thomas Waldron25岁，母亲Maryan Woldron25岁。他和Agnes Dislin至少有3个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1586年在他的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Waldron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (Mayo): from the Norman personal name Waleran, Galeran (ancient Germanic Walahram, Old French Galeran(t)), composed of the ancient Germanic elements walh ‘foreigner’ + hrafn ‘raven’. Compare Walraven . In Ireland, where it is common, this name was Gaelicized early as Mac Bhalronta, also later as Mac Bhaildrin and de Bhaldraithe.
English: habitational name from a place in Sussex named Waldron. The placename derives from Old English wald ‘woodland’ + ærn ‘building’.

History: This is the name of a prominent NH family, established there since the 17th century. Richard Walderne (born c. 1615) came to New England from Alchester, Warwickshire, England, c. 1640 and settled at Dover, NH.

variants.name: Walraven
meanings: German and Dutch: from Walravan, a personal name composed of the elements wal ‘battlefield’ + hraban ‘raven’. The personal name was popular among knights and patricians of the Lower Rhine and Upper Swabian region, where the surname is still common. This surname is also found in England.

variants.name: Walrond
meanings: English (Somerset and Devon): of Normin origin, a variant of   Waldron  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When William Waldron was born in 1535, in Lambourn, Berkshire, England, his father, Lord Thomas Waldron, was 25 and his mother, Maryan Woldron, was 25. He had at least 3 sons and 5 daughters with Agnes Dislin. He died in 1586, in his hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Waldron est né en 1535, à Lambourn, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Thomas Waldron, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Maryan Woldron, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles avec Agnes Dislin. Il est décédé en 1586, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Waldron 1535 in Lambourn, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Thomas Waldron 25 und seine Mutter Maryan Woldron 25. Er hatte mit Agnes Dislin mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1586 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Waldron è nato il nel 1535 nel Lambourn, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Thomas Waldron, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Maryan Woldron, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie con Agnes Dislin. Morì nel 1586, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Waldronが1535年にイギリスバークシュアイアランボウルンで生まれた時，父Lord Thomas Waldronは25歳，母Maryan Woldronは25歳であった。彼はAgnes Dislinとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1586年に故郷で51歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Waldron(이)가 1535년 영국 버크실르 램우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Thomas Waldron(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Maryan Woldron(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Agnes Dislin(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1586년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Waldron nasceu em 1535, em Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Thomas Waldron, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Maryan Woldron, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas com Agnes Dislin. Ele faleceu em 1586, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Waldron родился в 1535 г. в местности лэмбурн, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Thomas Waldron было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Maryan Woldron, 25. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей от Agnes Dislin. Он умер в 1586 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Waldron nació en 1535, en Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Thomas Waldron, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Maryan Woldron, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas con Agnes Dislin. Murió en 1586, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
